name: FDCTECH, INC.
business: FDCTech, Inc. is a financial technology company specializing in developing and delivering innovative software solutions and business services to the over-the-counter (OTC) brokerage and financial services industries. The Company provides a range of proprietary and third-party technology solutions, including its flagship Condor Trading Technology, which supports multi-asset trading, risk management, and pricing for forex, equities, commodities, and digital assets.
sellsTo: Over-the-counter brokerage and financial services industries

exposures.sentence: FDCTech, Inc. is a financial technology company specializing in developing and delivering innovative software solutions and business services to the over-the-counter (OTC) brokerage and financial services industries.
Through Xoala Asia, we intend to build a payment intermediary services business that provides payment gateway, merchant acquiring, cross-border remittance, and card processing capabilities.
The Board of Directors is responsible for overseeing the Company's cybersecurity risk management.

the global AI trading platform market is forecast to grow from approximately $11.2 billion in 2024 to $33.5 billion by 2030, reflecting a CAGR of about 20% as firms deploy AI for execution, analytics, and risk management

tamClaims.claim: Global FX daily turnover reached approximately $9.6 trillion in April 2025, an increase of about 28% compared to April 2022.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the Bank for International Settlements ( BIS ) 2025 triennial survey, average daily turnover in global FX markets reached approximately $9.6 trillion in April 2025, an increase of about 28% compared to April 2022 (1) .

tamClaims.claim: The global online trading platform market was approximately $9.6 billion in 2023 and is expected to reach $15.6 billion by 2030, representing a CAGR of approximately 7.3% from 2024 to 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: Industry research from Grand View Research estimates that the global online trading platform market was approximately $9.6 billion in 2023 and is expected to reach $15.6 billion by 2030, representing a compound annual growth rate ( CAGR ) of approximately 7.3% from 2024 to 2030 (2) .

tamClaims.claim: The global CFD broker market generated approximately $12.5 billion of revenue in 2023 and could reach $22.4 billion by 2032, implying a CAGR of approximately 6.7%.
tamClaims.sentence: DataIntelo (4) estimates that the global CFD broker market generated approximately $12.5 billion of revenue in 2023 and could reach $22.4 billion by 2032, implying a CAGR of approximately 6.7%.

tamClaims.claim: Global assets under management could increase from approximately $139 trillion in 2024 to about $200 trillion by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: A 2025 report by PwC projects that global assets under management could increase from approximately $139 trillion in 2024 to about $200 trillion by 2030 (5) , with wealth management for affluent individuals highlighted as a major growth area.

tamClaims.claim: The cross-border payments market generated approximately $212.6 billion in revenue in 2024 and could reach $320.7 billion by 2030, representing a projected CAGR of approximately 7.1%.
tamClaims.sentence: Grand View Research estimates that the cross-border payments market generated approximately $212.6 billion in revenue in 2024 and could reach $320.7 billion by 2030, representing a projected CAGR of approximately 7.1% over the period (9) .
